title: Real Water Falling Impact
description: The mod made the Landing Water not as useful as it in vanilla. It will calculate the damage scientifically to hurt the creatures, not only the players.
body:
Does hitting water really mean you are **safe**?
In reality, high-velocity water impacts can cause serious injury or **even be fatal**.
This mod removes vanilla mechanic that grants full fall damage immunity when landing in water. Now, jumping off cliffs, buildings, or End towers into a pool **_will not_** save you **from falling down**.
For players who crave realism and challenge!
